Fate: Destroyed during reentry on 2003-02-01; foam strike damaged wing leading edge RCC panels during launch
Destroyed 73 seconds after launch on 1986-01-28; O-ring failure in right SRB joint
Retired to Smithsonian National Air and Space Museum (Steven F. Udvar-Hazy Center)
Retired to Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex
Retired to California Science Center (Los Angeles); built as Challenger replacement
